languages.text: "Точность благословенных вычислений стремится к абсолютной, но абсолют ведом лишь Омниссии!"
"The accuracy of blessed calculations tends toward the absolute, but the absolute is the domain of the Omnissiah alone!"
languages.original_text: "Точность благословенных вычислений стремится к абсолютной, но абсолют ведом лишь Омниссии!"

traits.locale_text: "The accuracy of blessed calculations tends toward the absolute, but the absolute is the domain of the Omnissiah alone!"
"The accuracy of blessed calculations tends toward the absolute, but the absolute is the domain of the Omnissiah alone!"
"The accuracy of blessed calculations tends toward the absolute, but the absolute is the domain of the Omnissiah alone!"

languages.text: 「祝福された計算の正確さは絶対に向かうが、絶対は唯一神のみの領域である！」
languages.original_text: "The accuracy of blessed calculations tends toward the absolute, but the absolute is the domain of the Omnissiah alone!"

traits.locale_text: 「祝福された計算の正確さは絶対に向かうが、絶対は唯一神のみの領域である！」

languages.text: «La precisión de los cálculos benditos tiende hacia el absoluto, ¡pero el absoluto en sí es dominio exclusivo del Omnissiah!».
languages.original_text: "The accuracy of blessed calculations tends toward the absolute, but the absolute is the domain of the Omnissiah alone!"

traits.locale_text: «La precisión de los cálculos benditos tiende hacia el absoluto, ¡pero el absoluto en sí es dominio exclusivo del Omnissiah!».

languages.text: “神圣计算的精确度趋近绝对，但绝对之境唯属欧姆尼赛亚！”
languages.original_text: "The accuracy of blessed calculations tends toward the absolute, but the absolute is the domain of the Omnissiah alone!"

traits.locale_text: “神圣计算的精确度趋近绝对，但绝对之境唯属欧姆尼赛亚！”

languages.text: "Die Präzision gesegneter Berechnungen ist nicht selten absolut, aber das Absolute ist dem Omnissiah vorbehalten!"
languages.original_text: "The accuracy of blessed calculations tends toward the absolute, but the absolute is the domain of the Omnissiah alone!"

traits.locale_text: "Die Präzision gesegneter Berechnungen ist nicht selten absolut, aber das Absolute ist dem Omnissiah vorbehalten!"

languages.text: "Kutsal hesaplamaların doğruluğu mutlağa eğilimlidir ancak mutlak olanı yalnızca Hermesih bilir!"
languages.original_text: "The accuracy of blessed calculations tends toward the absolute, but the absolute is the domain of the Omnissiah alone!"

traits.locale_text: "Kutsal hesaplamaların doğruluğu mutlağa eğilimlidir ancak mutlak olanı yalnızca Hermesih bilir!"

languages.text: « La précision des calculs bénis tend vers l'absolu, mais l'absolu est le domaine de l'Omnimessie, et de Lui seul ! »
languages.original_text: "The accuracy of blessed calculations tends toward the absolute, but the absolute is the domain of the Omnissiah alone!"

traits.locale_text: « La précision des calculs bénis tend vers l'absolu, mais l'absolu est le domaine de l'Omnimessie, et de Lui seul ! »
